canonical_nt.summary: Named NT defect tranche is complete and guarded.

canonical_ot.summary: Canonical OT has source-backed NABRE overlay remediation and classified residuals, but remains not globally trusted.

psalms.summary: Psalms are a governed 155-record legacy psalter subsystem and remain not textually trusted.

deuterocanon.summary: Greek Esther/Daniel remain governed form-policy work. 3/4 Maccabees source acquisition is closed for active NRSV lane and recorded as source-backed repair state.

broader_canon.summary: Broader canon raw-text corpus is governed but not source-adjudicated or textually trusted.

vulgate.summary: Vulgate pilot lanes are committed as bounded source-lane data but remain pending full adjudication.

latestDeuterocanonSourceShapeReview.summary: Greek Esther and Greek Daniel source-shape review found no safe simple overlay. Greek Esther has substantial active/DRB/ordinary Esther form divergence. Greek Daniel is closer to DRB but remaining mismatches fall in Greek-addition territory. No Bible text was changed.

latestMaccabees34SourceState.summary: Current active 3 and 4 Maccabees files already carry NRSV source-backed repair metadata from BibleGateway NRSVA and the historical repair commit 8177b52. Raw source acquisition is no longer the next blocker for these files; further work is bounded source/form review and known-gap policy, especially 4 Maccabees 10:4 and 11:7-8.
